title: coelanthum grandiflorum
intro: Coelanthum grandiflorum, also known as the Giant Wintergreen, is a low-growing, evergreen perennial plant native to China and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of methyl salicylate, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Coelanthum grandiflorum include relief from pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as its use as a digestive aid and antiseptic. Coelanthum grandiflorum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with other herbs.
